items.title: API Reference
items.text: Agent-Sandbox exposes two API surfaces: a Native REST API and an E2B-compatible API. All endpoints require an API key passed in the Authorization header.

items.title: Authentication
items.text:
All API requests must include an API key:

Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>

Default system token: sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96

items.title: Native REST API
items.text: Base path: /api/v1

items.title: Create Sandbox
items.text:
POST /api/v1/sandbox

Request body:

Field Type Required Description name string no Sandbox name. Auto-generated if omitted. Lowercase letters, numbers, and -, max 50 chars. image string no Container image override.

Example:

curl -X POST http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>" \
  -d '{"name":"sandbox-01"}'

Response (200):

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox sandbox-01 created successfully"
}

items.title: List Sandboxes
items.text:
GET /api/v1/sandbox

Example:

curl http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>"

Response (200): Array of sandbox objects.

items.title: Get Sandbox
items.text:
GET /api/v1/sandbox/{name}

Path parameters:

Parameter Type Description name string Sandbox name

Response (200): Sandbox detail object.

items.title: Delete Sandbox
items.text:
DELETE /api/v1/sandbox/{name}

Example:

curl -X DELETE http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox/sandbox-01 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>"

Response (200):

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox sandbox-01 deleted successfully"
}

items.title: E2B-Compatible API
items.text:
Base path: /e2b/v1

These endpoints are compatible with the E2B protocol and SDK.

items.title: Create Sandbox
items.text:
POST /e2b/v1/sandboxes

Request body:

Field Type Required Description templateID string yes Template identifier (e.g. code-interpreter). Version suffix like -v1 is auto-stripped. Only alphanumeric, hyphens, and dots allowed. timeout int no Time-to-live in seconds. envVars object no Environment variables as key-value pairs. metadata object no Custom metadata as key-value pairs. secure bool no Enable HTTPS-only mode. allowInternetAccess bool no Allow outbound internet (default true). autoPause bool no Auto-pause on timeout instead of killing. network object no Network config with allowOut, denyOut, allowPublicTraffic, maskRequestHost. mcp object no MCP configuration.

Example:

curl -X POST http://<host>/e2b/v1/sandboxes \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>" \
  -d '{"templateID":"code-interpreter","timeout":300}'

Response (201):

{
  "sandboxID": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "clientID": "client-id-x",
  "envdVersion": "0.1.1",
  "envdAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "templateID": "code-interpreter",
  "trafficAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "domain": "example.domain.com",
  "metadata": { "name": "sandbox-abc123" },
  "cpuCount": 2000,
  "memoryMB": 4096,
  "diskSizeMB": 5120,
  "startedAt": "2026-01-27T10:00:00Z",
  "endAt": "2026-01-27T10:05:00Z",
  "state": "running"
}

items.title: Get Sandbox
items.text:
GET /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}

Path parameters:

Parameter Type Description sandboxID string Sandbox identifier

Response (200): Same as Create Sandbox response.

Error (404):

{
  "code": 404,
  "message": "sandbox <sandboxID> not found"
}

items.title: List Sandboxes
items.text:
GET /e2b/v1/v2/sandboxes

Response (200): Array of sandbox objects.

items.title: Connect to Sandbox
items.text:
POST /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}/connect

Request body:

Field Type Required Description timeout int32 no Timeout in seconds from now after which the sandbox should expire.

Response (201): Sandbox object (same shape as Get).

items.title: Delete Sandbox
items.text:
DELETE /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}

Response (200): Empty on success.

items.title: Error Format
items.text:
All API errors follow this JSON structure:

{
  "code": 400,
  "message": "human-readable error description"
}

Common HTTP status codes:

Status Meaning 400 Bad request (invalid input, missing parameters) 401 Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key) 404 Sandbox not found 500 Internal server error

items.title: Terminal
items.text:
POST /api/v1/terminal/sandbox/{name}

Execute a command in the sandbox.

items.title: Files
items.text:
GET    /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}                # List files
POST   /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}/upload          # Upload file
DELETE /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}                  # Delete file
GET    /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}/download         # Download file

items.title: Logs
items.text: GET /api/v1/logs/sandbox/{name}            # Get sandbox logs

items.title: List Events
items.text:
GET /api/v1/events

Response (200): Array of sandbox events.

items.title: Config API
items.text:
GET  /api/v1/config/templates              # Get templates config
POST /api/v1/config/templates              # Save templates config
GET  /api/v1/config/sandbox-template       # Get sandbox-template config
POST /api/v1/config/sandbox-template       # Save sandbox-template config

items.title: Pool API
items.text:
GET    /api/v1/pool                         # List pools
GET    /api/v1/pool/sandbox/{name}          # List pool sandboxes
DELETE /api/v1/pool/{name}                  # Delete pool

items.title: Other Endpoints
items.text: Path Description /mcp MCP server endpoint (Streamable HTTP) /sandbox/{name}/ Sandbox container router /sandboxes/router/{sandboxID}/{port}/ E2B-style sandbox port router /healthz Health check, returns {"status":"ok","version":"..."} /ui/ Web UI static files

items.title: E2B CLI Compatibility Guide
items.text: This document describes E2B CLI usage in a way that is compatible with the CLI behavior verified in this environment.

items.title: Installation
items.text:
Use the official installation instructions from the E2B CLI docs:

  • https://e2b.dev/docs/cli

After installation, verify your CLI is available:

e2b --version
e2b --help

items.title: Authentication
items.text:
Authenticate before sandbox operations:

export E2B_API_KEY=sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96
export E2B_API_URL=https://your.domain/e2b/v1

items.title: List sandboxes
items.text:
List running sandboxes (default behavior):

e2b sandbox list

# JSON output
e2b sandbox list --format json

items.title: Create sandbox
items.text:
Create a sandbox and connect your terminal to it:

# Use default template
e2b sandbox create

# Specify template
e2b sandbox create code-interpreter

items.title: Connect to sandbox
items.text:
Connect to an existing running sandbox by ID:

e2b sandbox connect <sandboxID>

Example:

e2b sandbox connect sbx_1234567890

items.title: Execute commands in sandbox
items.text:
Run a command in a running sandbox:

e2b sandbox exec <sandboxID> <command...>

Examples:

# Basic command
e2b sandbox exec sbx_1234567890 ls -la

# Set working directory
e2b sandbox exec --cwd /home/user sbx_1234567890 pwd

# Run as specific user
e2b sandbox exec --user root sbx_1234567890 whoami

# Pass environment variables (repeatable)
e2b sandbox exec -e FOO=bar -e HELLO=world sbx_1234567890 env

# Run in background
e2b sandbox exec --background sbx_1234567890 python -m http.server 8080

items.title: Environment Variables
items.text: Agent-Sandbox is configured via environment variables using envconfig. This page documents all available configuration options.

items.title: SERVER_ADDR
items.text:
Server listen address.

  • Default: 0.0.0.0:10000
  • Example: 0.0.0.0:8080

items.title: API_BASE_URL
items.text:
Computed as /api/{API_VERSION}. Not normally overridden.

  • Default: /api/v1

items.title: SYSTEM_TOKEN
items.text:
System administrator token with full access to all resources.

  • Default: sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96
  • Example: sys-your-custom-admin-token

items.title: API_TOKENS_RAW
items.text:
Comma-separated list of additional API tokens. The SYSTEM_TOKEN is automatically prepended.

  • Default: testuser-aef134ef-7aa1-945e-9399-7df9a4ad0c3f
  • Example: user1-abc123,user2-def456,user3-ghi789
  • Note: Tokens must be at least 5 characters long.

Tokens are parsed and validated at startup. Invalid or empty tokens are ignored.

items.title: SANDBOX_NAMESPACE
items.text:
Kubernetes namespace where sandbox pods and ReplicaSets are created.

  • Default: default
  • Example: agent-sandbox

items.title: CONFIGMAP_NAME
items.text:
Name of the ConfigMap used to store templates and sandbox template configuration.

  • Default: agent-sandbox
  • Example: my-sandbox-config

items.title: SANDBOX_DEFAULT_IMAGE
items.text:
Default container image used when creating sandboxes without specifying a template.

  • Default: ghcr.io/agent-infra/sandbox:latest
  • Example: myregistry/my-sandbox:v1.0.0

items.title: SANDBOX_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE
items.text:
Default template name used when not specified.

  • Default: aio
  • Example: code-interpreter

items.title: E2B Compatibility
items.text: These environment variables are used by E2B SDK clients to connect to Agent-Sandbox.

items.title: E2B_DOMAIN
items.text:
Domain used for sandbox URL generation.

  • Default: localhost
  • Example: sandbox.example.com
  • SDK Usage: Sets the base domain for sandbox access URLs.

items.title: E2B_API_URL
items.text:
Base URL for E2B-compatible API endpoints.

  • Default: (none, SDK uses default)
  • Example: http://localhost:10000/e2b/v1
  • SDK Usage: Override the API endpoint for E2B SDK calls.

items.title: E2B_API_KEY
items.text:
API key used by E2B SDK for authentication.

  • Default: (none)
  • Example: sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96
  • SDK Usage: Authentication token passed in Authorization: Bearer header.

items.title: Sidecar: sucall-server
items.text: The sucall-server sidecar has its own environment variables.

items.title: SUCALL_ALLOWED_COMMAND_PREFIXES
items.text:
Comma-separated list of allowed command prefixes for the sucall wrapper.

  • Default: s3fs,fusermount
  • Example: ls,s3fs,fusermount,mount,umount
  • Note: Commands are matched by exact prefix. export is always allowed as a built-in.

items.title: ENV_NAME
items.text:
Environment name label for deployment identification.

  • Default: dev
  • Example: production, staging

items.title: Kubernetes Deployment
items.text:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: agent-sandbox
  namespace: agent-sandbox
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: agent-sandbox
        env:
        - name: SYSTEM_TOKEN
          value: "sys-your-admin-token"
        - name: API_TOKENS_RAW
          value: "user1-abc123,user2-def456"
        - name: SANDBOX_NAMESPACE
          value: "agent-sandbox"
        - name: E2B_DOMAIN
          value: "sandbox.example.com"

items.title: Reference
items.text: Variable Default Description SERVER_ADDR 0.0.0.0:10000 Server listen address SYSTEM_TOKEN sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96 System admin token API_TOKENS_RAW testuser-aef134ef-7aa1-945e-9399-7df9a4ad0c3f Comma-separated user tokens SANDBOX_NAMESPACE default Kubernetes namespace for sandboxes CONFIGMAP_NAME agent-sandbox ConfigMap name for config storage SANDBOX_DEFAULT_IMAGE ghcr.io/agent-infra/sandbox:latest Default sandbox image SANDBOX_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE aio Default template name E2B_DOMAIN localhost E2B SDK domain E2B_API_URL (none) E2B API URL override E2B_API_KEY (none) E2B SDK API key SUCALL_ALLOWED_COMMAND_PREFIXES ls,s3fs,fusermount Allowed commands for sucall ENV_NAME dev Environment name label

Code can also be highlighted inline: print("Hello, Python!").

items.text:
End a line with two spaces  
to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.

items.title: Agent-Sandbox Overview
items.text:
Agent-Sandbox is an open-source, Kubernetes-native runtime platform for AI agents. It provides isolated, stateful, multi-tenant sandboxes for code execution, browser/computer tasks, and shell workflows.

The project is designed to be compatible with E2B protocol and SDK workflows while also exposing native REST API, MCP, and a web UI.

items.title: Features
items.text:
• Set up in 5 minutes

    Install Agent-Sandobx with kubectl apply and get up and running in minutes

    Getting started

  • Ai friendly

    Supports Skills, Cli and MCP to empower your agents with sandbox capabilities

    Reference

  • Easy to use

    Designed with a simple REST API, UI and minimizing Kubernetes's objects to deploy for easy to use and maintain.

  • Open and flexible

    Supports E2B templates and any container image, and can be extended with custom templates.

items.title: What it provides
items.text:
• E2B protocol compatibility for sandbox lifecycle APIs and routing.
  • Sandbox lifecycle management: create, list, connect, delete.
  • Multi-tenant access control with system and regular users.
  • Template and pool management for fast sandbox allocation and warmup.
  • Observability with sandbox events, metrics, and logs.
  • Interactive operations: terminal, file upload/download, and sandbox routing.
  • MCP server integration for agent-native automation.
  • Web UI for sandbox/template/pool operations and runtime inspection.

items.title: Quick start
items.text: See Quick Start for a step-by-step guide covering deployment, creating a sandbox via E2B SDK, and using the REST API.

items.title: Quick Start
items.text: This guide walks you through deploying Agent-Sandbox and creating your first sandbox via E2B SDK and REST API.

items.title: Prerequisites
items.text:
• Kubernetes cluster (version 1.26 or higher)
  • kubectl configured to access your cluster
  • (Optional) e2b-code-interpreter Python SDK: pip install e2b-code-interpreter

items.title: 1. Deploy Agent-Sandbox
items.text:
Apply the installation manifest:

kubectl create namespace agent-sandbox
kubectl apply -n agent-sandbox -f install.yaml

Tip

Download install.yaml: https://github.com/agent-sandbox/agent-sandbox/blob/main/install.yaml

install.yaml contains the full deployment configuration and Agent-Sandbox controller component.

items.title: 2. Expose the Service
items.text:
Create an Ingress:

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: agent-sandbox
  namespace: agent-sandbox
spec:
  ingressClassName: ingress-nginx
  rules:
  - host: agent-sandbox.your-host.com
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: agent-sandbox
            port:
              number: 80
        path: /

Or port-forward for local testing:

kubectl port-forward -n agent-sandbox svc/agent-sandbox 8080:80

items.title: 3. Verify Deployment
items.text:
curl https://agent-sandbox.your-host.com/healthz

Expected response:

{"status":"ok","version":"xxx"}

items.title: 4. Authentication
items.text:
Get your API key. The default system token is:

sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96

All API requests require the Authorization header:

Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>

items.title: Create Sandbox via E2B SDK
items.text: The E2B SDK is the recommended way for Python applications.

items.title: Install the SDK
items.text: pip install e2b-code-interpreter

items.title: Configure Environment
items.text:
import os

# Point SDK to your Agent-Sandbox instance
os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = 'https://agent-sandbox.your-host.com/e2b/v1'
os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = 'sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96'
os.environ['E2B_DOMAIN'] = 'agent-sandbox.your-host.com'

items.title: For local development
items.text:
Warning

For local or dev no HTTPS environment, the SDK's default API URL won't work. Use the following configuration to connect to a local instance without HTTPS:

def local():
    os.environ['E2B_DEBUG'] = "true"
    os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = 'http://localhost:10000/e2b/v1'
    os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = 'testuser-aef134ef-7aa1-945e-9399-7df9a4ad0c3f'
    os.environ['E2B_DOMAIN'] = 'localhost:10000'

    def __connection_config_get_host(_, sandbox_id: str, sandbox_domain: str, port: int) -> str:
        return f"{sandbox_domain}/sandboxes/router/{sandbox_id}/{port}"
    from e2b import ConnectionConfig
    ConnectionConfig.get_host = __connection_config_get_host

items.title: Create and Use a Sandbox
items.text:
from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox

# Create a sandbox
sandbox = Sandbox.create(template='code-interpreter', timeout=300)

print(f"Sandbox ID: {sandbox.sandbox_id}")

# Execute code
execution = sandbox.run_code("print('Hello from Agent-Sandbox!')")
print(execution.logs)

# Run a shell command
result = sandbox.commands.run("ls -la")
print(result.stdout)

# Clean up
sandbox.kill()

items.title: Connect to an Existing Sandbox
items.text:
from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox

# Reconnect by ID
sandbox = Sandbox.connect("existing-sandbox-id")
print(f"Connected to: {sandbox.sandbox_id}")

items.title: Create Sandbox via REST API
items.text: For non-Python environments, use the REST API directly.

items.title: Native REST API
items.text:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96" \
  -d '{"name":"my-sandbox"}'

Response:

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox my-sandbox created successfully"
}

items.title: E2B-Compatible API
items.text:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/e2b/v1/sandboxes \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96" \
  -d '{"templateID":"code-interpreter","timeout":300}'

Response:

{
  "sandboxID": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "templateID": "code-interpreter",
  "clientID": "client-id-x",
  "envdVersion": "0.1.1",
  "envdAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "trafficAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "domain": "localhost:8080",
  "metadata": {"name": "sandbox-abc123"},
  "cpuCount": 2000,
  "memoryMB": 4096,
  "diskSizeMB": 5120,
  "startedAt": "2026-01-27T10:00:00Z",
  "endAt": "2026-01-27T10:05:00Z",
  "state": "running"
}

items.title: List Sandboxes
items.text:
curl http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96"

items.title: Delete Sandbox
items.text:
curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox/my-sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96"

items.title: E2B Workarounds
items.text:
Since E2B SDK need HTTPS and Wildcard Domain support for sandbox routing, if your environment doesn't support these features, you can use the following workarounds to adapt to your environment.

E2B default sandbox URL format is as follows: https://{port}-{sandboxID}.your-domain.com

e.g. https://6080-294bef011f1e4567b4c5d02593e2e90e.example.com

‼️ If you don't have https or Wildcard Domain(*.example.com) support, please config and hack by the following functions no_wildcard() to adapt to your environment.

import os

def no_wildcard():
    os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = 'http://localhost:10000/e2b/v1'
    os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = 'testuser-aef134ef-7aa1-945e-9399-7df9a4ad0c3f'
    os.environ['E2B_DOMAIN'] = 'localhost:10000'

    def __connection_config_get_host(_, sandbox_id: str, sandbox_domain: str, port: int) -> str:
        return f"{sandbox_domain}/sandboxes/router/{sandbox_id}/{port}"
    from e2b import ConnectionConfig
    ConnectionConfig.get_host = __connection_config_get_host

items.title: No HTTPS
items.text: os.environ['E2B_DEBUG'] = "true" will use HTTP for API requests, which is useful for local development without HTTPS.

items.title: Kubernetes Ingress Configuration for Wildcard Domain
items.text:
You can set the following environment variables to configure E2B SDK:

import os
os.environ['E2B_DOMAIN'] = 'example.domain.com'
os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = 'https://example.domain.com/e2b/v1'
os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = 'testuser-aef134ef-7aa1-945e-9399-7df9a4ad0c3f'

Agent-Sandbox ingress should also be configured to support wildcard domain.

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: agent-sandbox
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: 1024M
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-connect-timeout: "300"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "300"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout: "300"
spec:
  ingressClassName: ingress-controller
  rules:
    - host: "*.example.domain.com"
      http:
        paths:
          - backend:
              service:
                name: agent-sandbox
                port:
                  number: 80
            path: /
            pathType: ImplementationSpecific

items.title: More Information
items.text:
• E2B Official Documentation
  • e2b-code-interpreter SDK
  • E2B Desktop SDK

items.title: Agent-Sandbox 概览
items.text:
Agent-Sandbox 是一个面向 AI Agent 的开源沙箱运行时平台，基于 Kubernetes，提供隔离、可持久、多租户的沙箱能力，适用于代码执行、浏览器/桌面操作、终端命令等场景。

项目支持 E2B 协议与 SDK 生态，同时提供原生 REST API、Skills、MCP 接口和 Web UI。

items.title: 核心能力
items.text:
• 兼容 E2B 协议，可接入现有 E2B 风格工作流。
  • 沙箱全生命周期管理：创建、查询、连接、删除。
  • 多租户与权限控制：区分系统用户与普通用户。
  • 模板与池化能力：支持模板池、预热和动态模板。
  • 可观测性：支持事件、指标、日志。
  • 交互式运维能力：终端、文件上传下载、沙箱路由访问。
  • MCP 集成：可供 Agent 自动化管理沙箱。
  • 可视化 UI：统一管理沙箱、模板、池和运行状态。

items.title: 接口与入口
items.text:
Agent-Sandbox 提供两类 API 接口：

  • 原生 REST API（/api/v1）：完整的沙箱生命周期、终端、文件、配置、池、日志、事件、指标。
  • E2B 兼容 API（/e2b/v1）：与 E2B 协议兼容的沙箱 CRUD 和连接接口。

此外还提供 MCP（/mcp）、沙箱路由、UI 和健康检查端点。

详见 API 参考。

items.title: 鉴权与权限
items.text:
• HTTP 层已启用 API Key 鉴权中间件。
  • 支持系统用户与普通用户权限隔离。
  • 文档中的默认系统用户 token：
  • sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96
  • 可通过环境变量配置用户 token。

items.title: 快速开始
items.text: 详见 快速开始，包含部署、通过 E2B SDK 创建沙箱和使用 REST API 的完整步骤。

items.title: E2B CLI 兼容说明
items.text:
CLI 使用说明见：

  • /cli/README.md

其中包含 Installation、Authentication、List sandboxes、Create sandbox、Connect to sandbox、Execute commands in sandbox 等章节。

items.title: 版本演进摘要
items.text:
来自 CHANGELOG.md 的关键版本：

  • v0.2.0：支持 E2B 协议、Code Interpreter、Desktop。
  • v0.3.0：引入模板池和动态模板。
  • v0.3.1：支持从 ConfigMap 动态加载模板配置、模板池预热。
  • v0.4.0：上线沙箱管理 UI。
  • v0.4.1：增加事件/指标能力与模板资源、元数据配置。
  • v0.4.2：增加模板 args、基础权限控制、池获取性能优化、UI 排序增强。

items.title: 参考
items.text:
• 根目录 README：/README.md
  • 变更日志：/CHANGELOG.md
  • 仓库内 E2B CLI 指南：/cli/README.md

items.title: API 参考
items.text: Agent-Sandbox 提供两类 API 接口：原生 REST API 和 E2B 兼容 API。所有接口均需在 Authorization 请求头携带 API Key。

items.title: 鉴权
items.text:
所有请求必须包含 API Key：

Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>

默认系统用户 token：sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96

items.title: 原生 REST API
items.text: 基础路径：/api/v1

items.title: 创建沙箱
items.text:
POST /api/v1/sandbox

请求体：

字段 类型 必填 说明 name string 否 沙箱名称，不填则自动生成。仅支持小写字母、数字和 -，最大 50 字符。 image string 否 容器镜像覆盖配置。

示例：

curl -X POST http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>" \
  -d '{"name":"sandbox-01"}'

响应 (200)：

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox sandbox-01 created successfully"
}

items.title: 列出沙箱
items.text:
GET /api/v1/sandbox

示例：

curl http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>"

响应 (200)： 沙箱对象数组。

items.title: 获取沙箱
items.text:
GET /api/v1/sandbox/{name}

路径参数：

参数 类型 说明 name string 沙箱名称

响应 (200)： 沙箱详情对象。

items.title: 删除沙箱
items.text:
DELETE /api/v1/sandbox/{name}

示例：

curl -X DELETE http://<host>/api/v1/sandbox/sandbox-01 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>"

响应 (200)：

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox sandbox-01 deleted successfully"
}

items.title: 沙箱指标
items.text:
POST /api/v1/sandbox/metrics

响应 (200)： 沙箱指标数据。

items.title: 事件列表
items.text:
GET /api/v1/events

响应 (200)： 沙箱事件数组。

items.title: 终端
items.text:
POST /api/v1/terminal/sandbox/{name}

在沙箱中执行命令。

GET /api/v1/terminal/sandbox/{name}/ws

WebSocket 终端流。

items.title: 文件操作
items.text:
GET    /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}                # 列出文件
POST   /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}/upload          # 上传文件
DELETE /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}                  # 删除文件
GET    /api/v1/sandbox/files/{name}/download         # 下载文件

items.title: 配置管理
items.text:
GET  /api/v1/config/templates              # 获取模板配置
POST /api/v1/config/templates              # 保存模板配置
GET  /api/v1/config/sandbox-template       # 获取 sandbox-template 配置
POST /api/v1/config/sandbox-template       # 保存 sandbox-template 配置

items.title: 池管理
items.text:
GET    /api/v1/pool                         # 列出池
GET    /api/v1/pool/sandbox/{name}          # 列出池内沙箱
DELETE /api/v1/pool/{name}                  # 删除池

items.title: 日志
items.text: GET /api/v1/logs/sandbox/{name}            # 获取沙箱日志

items.title: E2B 兼容 API
items.text:
基础路径：/e2b/v1

以下接口与 E2B 协议和 SDK 兼容。

items.title: 创建沙箱
items.text:
POST /e2b/v1/sandboxes

请求体：

字段 类型 必填 说明 templateID string 是 模板标识（如 code-interpreter）。版本后缀如 -v1 会自动去除。仅支持字母、数字、连字符和点。 timeout int 否 存活时间（秒）。 envVars object 否 环境变量键值对。 metadata object 否 自定义元数据键值对。 secure bool 否 启用 HTTPS-only 模式。 allowInternetAccess bool 否 允许出站网络（默认 true）。 autoPause bool 否 超时后自动暂停而非销毁。 network object 否 网络配置，含 allowOut、denyOut、allowPublicTraffic、maskRequestHost。 mcp object 否 MCP 配置。

示例：

curl -X POST http://<host>/e2b/v1/sandboxes \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <api-key>" \
  -d '{"templateID":"code-interpreter","timeout":300}'

响应 (201)：

{
  "sandboxID": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "clientID": "client-id-x",
  "envdVersion": "0.1.1",
  "envdAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "templateID": "code-interpreter",
  "trafficAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "domain": "example.domain.com",
  "metadata": { "name": "sandbox-abc123" },
  "cpuCount": 2000,
  "memoryMB": 4096,
  "diskSizeMB": 5120,
  "startedAt": "2026-01-27T10:00:00Z",
  "endAt": "2026-01-27T10:05:00Z",
  "state": "running"
}

items.title: 获取沙箱
items.text:
GET /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}

路径参数：

参数 类型 说明 sandboxID string 沙箱标识

响应 (200)： 与创建沙箱响应结构相同。

错误 (404)：

{
  "code": 404,
  "message": "sandbox <sandboxID> not found"
}

items.title: 列出沙箱
items.text:
GET /e2b/v1/v2/sandboxes

响应 (200)： 沙箱对象数组。

items.title: 连接沙箱
items.text:
POST /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}/connect

请求体：

字段 类型 必填 说明 timeout int32 否 从当前时间起算的超时秒数。

响应 (201)： 沙箱对象（结构与获取沙箱相同）。

items.title: 删除沙箱
items.text:
DELETE /e2b/v1/sandboxes/{sandboxID}

响应 (200)： 成功时为空。

items.title: 错误格式
items.text:
所有 API 错误均采用如下 JSON 结构：

{
  "code": 400,
  "message": "可读的错误描述"
}

常见 HTTP 状态码：

状态码 含义 400 请求错误（输入无效、参数缺失） 401 未授权（缺少或无效的 API Key） 404 沙箱未找到 500 内部服务错误

items.title: 其他端点
items.text: 路径 说明 /mcp MCP 服务端点（Streamable HTTP） /sandbox/{name}/ 沙箱容器路由 /sandboxes/router/{sandboxID}/{port}/ E2B 风格沙箱端口路由 /healthz 健康检查，返回 {"status":"ok","version":"..."} /ui/ Web UI 静态文件

items.title: Headers
items.text:
# H1 Header
## H2 Header
### H3 Header
#### H4 Header
##### H5 Header
###### H6 Header

items.title: Text formatting
items.text:
**bold text**
*italic text*
***bold and italic***
~~strikethrough~~
`inline code`

items.title: Links and images
items.text:
[Link text](https://example.com)
[Link with title](https://example.com "Hover title")
![Alt text](image.jpg)
![Image with title](image.jpg "Image title")

items.title: Lists
items.text:
Unordered:
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item

Ordered:
1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

items.title: Blockquotes
items.text:
> This is a blockquote
> Multiple lines
>> Nested quote

items.title: Code blocks
items.text:
```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

items.title: Tables
items.text:
| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Row 1    | Data     | Data     |
| Row 2    | Data     | Data     |

items.title: Horizontal rule
items.text:
---
or
***
or
___

items.title: Task lists
items.text:
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Incomplete task
- [ ] Another task

items.title: Escaping characters
items.text: Use backslash to escape: \* \_ \# \`

items.title: Line breaks
items.text:
End a line with two spaces  
to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.

items.title: 快速开始
items.text: 本指南带你完成 Agent-Sandbox 的部署，并通过 E2B SDK 和 REST API 创建你的第一个沙箱。

items.title: 前置条件
items.text:
• Kubernetes 集群（版本 1.26 或更高）
  • 已配置 kubectl 可访问集群
  • （可选）e2b-code-interpreter Python SDK：pip install e2b-code-interpreter

items.title: 1. 部署 Agent-Sandbox
items.text:
应用安装清单：

kubectl create namespace agent-sandbox
kubectl apply -n agent-sandbox -f install.yaml

items.title: 2. 暴露服务
items.text:
创建 Ingress 或使用端口转发：

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: agent-sandbox
  namespace: agent-sandbox
spec:
  ingressClassName: ingress-nginx
  rules:
  - host: agent-sandbox.your-host.com
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: agent-sandbox
            port:
              number: 80
        path: /

或使用端口转发进行本地测试：

kubectl port-forward -n agent-sandbox svc/agent-sandbox 8080:80

items.title: 3. 验证部署
items.text:
curl http://localhost:8080/healthz

预期响应：

{"status":"ok","version":"0.4.2"}

items.title: 4. 认证
items.text:
获取你的 API Key。默认系统用户 token 为：

sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96

所有 API 请求均需携带 Authorization 请求头：

Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>

items.title: 通过 E2B SDK 创建沙箱
items.text: 推荐 Python 应用使用 E2B SDK。

items.title: 安装 SDK
items.text: pip install e2b-code-interpreter

items.title: 配置环境
items.text:
import os

# 将 SDK 指向你的 Agent-Sandbox 实例
os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = 'http://localhost:8080/e2b/v1'
os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = 'sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96'
os.environ['E2B_DOMAIN'] = 'localhost:8080'

items.title: 创建并使用沙箱
items.text:
from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox

# 创建沙箱
sandbox = Sandbox.create(template='code-interpreter', timeout=300)

print(f"Sandbox ID: {sandbox.sandbox_id}")

# 执行代码
execution = sandbox.run_code("print('Hello from Agent-Sandbox!')")
print(execution.logs)

# 运行 shell 命令
result = sandbox.commands.run("ls -la")
print(result.stdout)

# 清理
sandbox.kill()

items.title: 连接已有沙箱
items.text:
from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox

# 通过 ID 重连
sandbox = Sandbox.connect("existing-sandbox-id")
print(f"Connected to: {sandbox.sandbox_id}")

items.title: 通过 REST API 创建沙箱
items.text: 非 Python 环境可直接调用 REST API。

items.title: 原生 REST API
items.text:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96" \
  -d '{"name":"my-sandbox"}'

响应：

{
  "code": "0",
  "data": "Sandbox my-sandbox created successfully"
}

items.title: E2B 兼容 API
items.text:
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/e2b/v1/sandboxes \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96" \
  -d '{"templateID":"code-interpreter","timeout":300}'

响应：

{
  "sandboxID": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "templateID": "code-interpreter",
  "clientID": "client-id-x",
  "envdVersion": "0.1.1",
  "envdAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "trafficAccessToken": "e94466d4e94466d4",
  "domain": "localhost:8080",
  "metadata": {"name": "sandbox-abc123"},
  "cpuCount": 2000,
  "memoryMB": 4096,
  "diskSizeMB": 5120,
  "startedAt": "2026-01-27T10:00:00Z",
  "endAt": "2026-01-27T10:05:00Z",
  "state": "running"
}

items.title: 列出沙箱
items.text:
curl http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96"

items.title: 删除沙箱
items.text:
curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sandbox/my-sandbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sys-2492a85b10ed4cb083b2c76b181eac96"

items.title: 下一步
items.text:
• API 参考 — 完整 API 文档
  • E2B CLI 指南 — CLI 使用示例
  • 示例 — 更多集成示例
